name: craft
description: Personal Claude Code engineering skills and agents.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Opinionated engineering skills and agents for Claude Code — a broad Rust skill set (ownership, concurrency, traits, performance, unsafe, errors, idioms, ecosystem, architecture, web, CLI, security, plugins, macros, fintech, cloud-native), language-agnostic engineering skills (specs, debugging, refactoring, onboarding), and code-review / security / Miri agents. Self-contained, no plugin dependencies.
